questions.q: What are Minnesota authorities investigating federal ICE officers for regarding the January 2026 detention of a US citizen?
For what reason did an 86-year-old French woman, who was detained by ICE in Louisiana in April 2026, originally move to the United States?
options: To reunite with her long-lost love
To evade tax fraud charges in Europe
questions.correctText: To reunite with her long-lost love

questions.q: In April 2026, the Justice Department asked a federal appeals court to throw out the seditious conspiracy convictions of leaders from which two groups?
options: Boogaloo Bois and the Proud Boys

questions.q: On April 14, 2026, Omaha police fatally shot a woman outside a Walmart after she allegedly did what?
options: Attempted to rob the pharmacy with a handgun
Held a store manager hostage in the parking lot
Drove a stolen vehicle through the front doors

questions.q: On April 14, 2026, shipping data revealed that a sanctioned tanker owned by which country passed through the Strait of Hormuz despite a new US blockade?
